channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Blood vs Duty: Marcus rescues Jalil from danger in dramatic Episode 77
item.description: The latest episode of 'Blood vs Duty' continues to deliver intense drama as Marcus Reyes takes immediate action to save Jalil Abubakar from a perilous situation. The episode, titled 'Episode 77,' show...

item.title: Nathan Buckley expresses disappointment over missed opportunity for AFL coaching role
item.description: The article details Nathan Buckley's reaction to being overlooked for the AFL coaching positions with the Adelaide Crows (Devils). Buckley, a former player and current commentator, expressed his disap...

item.title: Albert Ojwang's Death in Custody: CCTV Shows Abuse by Four Men at Police Station
item.description: The murder trial of Albert Ojwang, a 30-year-old teacher and blogger from Homa Bay, has gained new attention after fresh CCTV footage was presented in court. The footage, captured at Nairobi's Central...

item.title: U.S. Imposes 50% Tariffs on Canadian Goods Amid Trade Tensions
item.description: The article discusses the U.S. administration's imposition of new tariffs on Canadian goods, including a 50% duty on alcohol and dairy products, as part of ongoing trade tensions. President Trump's de...

item.title: Liberian Refugee Miatta Fahnbulleh Leads Britain's Energy Transition
item.description: Miatta Fahnbulleh, a Liberian refugee who fled her homeland during its civil war, has risen to become the UK's energy secretary. Born in Monrovia in 1979, she escaped Liberia's political turmoil as a ...

item.title: Essential Films for Understanding the Nuclear Age
item.description: The article presents a curated list of thirteen films that reflect and shape public perception of the nuclear age. Spanning from the 1950s to 2023, these films capture the anxieties, fears, and cultur...

item.title: Political clash over funding as Burnham's VAT cut faces scrutiny
item.description: Former Chief Secretary Darren Jones has publicly criticised the government's DigitalID programme funding amid Andy Burnham's announcement to cut VAT on electricity bills. Jones, who previously support...

item.title: Senate impeachment court adjusts schedule for Sara Duterte impeachment trial
item.description: The Senate impeachment court has announced changes to the schedule of Vice President Sara Duterte’s impeachment trial, with adjustments made to accommodate major government activities and legislative ...

item.title: Former Niger Governor Urges Investment in Education for National Development

item.title: Competition in mobile money services between Wave and Orange in West Africa
item.description: The article discusses the growing competition between Wave and Orange Money in the West African CFA franc zone, highlighting how both firms are vying for dominance in the mobile financial services sec...

item.title: ASEAN's Engagement with Myanmar's Junta Faces Challenges Without Proof of Aung San Suu Kyi's Safety

item.title: Indian Opposition Leader Arrested During Protest Against Education Reforms
item.description: Indian opposition leader Rahul Gandhi and his sister Priyanka Gandhi, along with Samajwadi Party chief Akhilesh Yadav, were detained by Delhi Police during a protest outside Prime Minister Narendra Mo...

item.title: Felix Omondi battles sickle cell disease with kidney transplant hope
item.description: Felix Omondi, 36, has lived with sickle cell disease since birth, surviving a condition that claimed his brother's life at two. After years of managing chronic kidney disease and frequent blood transf...

item.title: IIT Roorkee Issues Routine Advisory Against Political Activities Amid Protests
item.description: The Indian Institute of Technology (IIT), Roorkee, has issued a routine advisory directing students and staff to avoid political activities or discussions without administrative permission. The direct...

item.title: Argentina's Controversial World Cup Run: Lessons from the Final
item.description: Enzo Fernandez, Argentina's midfielder, said his team gave their all despite controversies during the 2026 World Cup. The squad faced clashes like his red card in the final against Spain and post-matc...

item.title: Western Cape Forensic Lab Gains International Accreditation for Drug Testing Methods
item.description: The Western Cape Department of Health and Wellness has announced that its Forensic Toxicology Unit has achieved ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation for drug testing methods, marking a significant milestone in...

item.title: Apple Music raises subscription fees due to rising licensing costs
item.description: Apple Music has announced immediate price increases for its subscription plans across the UK, Europe, and the US, attributing the changes to rising licensing costs. The individual plan in the UK will ...

item.title: Jenn Nawada: Landscape Designer and TV Personality with Roots in Vermont Farming
item.description: Jenn Nawada, a renowned landscape designer and TV personality, credits her early experiences on a Vermont farm for shaping her career. The article highlights her journey from agricultural roots to bec...

item.title: Exploring Identity and Family Dynamics in a Changing Legal Landscape
